steps.title: Set up the three parts
steps.content: The word "threefold" announces that the following phrases explain the three parts of Simpson's impact: expanding, challenging, and shedding light.

steps.title: Use a colon for explanation
steps.content: A uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause, B has no punctuation to introduce the explanation, and C turns the following phrase into a fragment. A colon correctly introduces the elaboration. The answer is D.
